proposed_hypotheses.text: Each 10-year higher `age_years` is associated with longer `pfs_months` after adjustment for treatment, stage, histology, smoking, ECOG performance status, metastatic burden, inflammatory/nutritional labs, and key biomarkers.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated the effect per 10-year higher age_years as 1.684 PFS months (SE 0.003, p=0.000).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `stage_iv` equal to 1 have shorter `pfs_months` than patients with `stage_iv` equal to 0 after multivariable adjustment.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated the stage_iv-positive versus stage_iv-negative difference as -1.417 PFS months (SE 0.007, p=0.000).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `ecog_ps` equal to 2 have shorter `pfs_months` than patients with `ecog_ps` equal to 0 after multivariable adjustment.

analyses.code: adjusted OLS coefficient for ecog_ps == 2 vs 0
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated the ecog_ps 2 versus 0 difference as -2.177 PFS months (SE 0.010, p=0.000).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `has_brain_mets` equal to 1 have shorter `pfs_months` than patients without brain metastases after multivariable adjustment.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated the has_brain_mets-positive versus negative difference as -0.912 PFS months (SE 0.007, p=0.000).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `histology` equal to squamous have shorter `pfs_months` than patients with adenocarcinoma histology after multivariable adjustment.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated the squamous versus adenocarcinoma difference as -0.723 PFS months (SE 0.008, p=0.000).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `smoking_status` equal to current have shorter `pfs_months` than patients with `smoking_status` equal to never after multivariable adjustment.

analyses.code: adjusted OLS coefficient for smoking_status == current vs never
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated the current versus never smoking difference as -0.545 PFS months (SE 0.012, p=0.000).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `sex_female` equal to 1 have shorter `pfs_months` than patients with `sex_female` equal to 0 after multivariable adjustment.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated the sex_female-positive versus negative difference as -0.203 PFS months (SE 0.007, p=0.000).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Each 1 percentage-point higher `weight_loss_pct_6mo` is associated with shorter `pfs_months` after multivariable adjustment.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated the effect per 1 percentage-point higher weight_loss_pct_6mo as -0.073 PFS months (SE 0.001, p=0.000).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Each 1 g/dL higher `albumin_g_dl` is associated with longer `pfs_months` after multivariable adjustment.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated the effect per 1 g/dL higher albumin_g_dl as 0.463 PFS months (SE 0.006, p=0.000).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Each 100 U/L higher `ldh_u_l` is associated with shorter `pfs_months` after multivariable adjustment.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated the effect per 100 U/L higher ldh_u_l as -0.045 PFS months (SE 0.004, p=0.000).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving `treatment_sotorasib` have longer `pfs_months` than patients not receiving `treatment_sotorasib` after multivariable adjustment.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated the treatment_sotorasib versus no sotorasib difference as 0.323 PFS months (SE 0.007, p=0.000).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association between `treatment_sotorasib` and longer `pfs_months` is concentrated in patients with `kras_g12c`; the `treatment_sotorasib` by `kras_g12c` interaction is positive.

analyses.code: adjusted OLS with treatment_sotorasib * kras_g12c plus treatment, biomarker, and clinical covariates
analyses.result_summary: The treatment_sotorasib by kras_g12c interaction was 2.533 PFS months (SE 0.017, p=0.000).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with `kras_g12c` equal to 1, `treatment_sotorasib` is associated with longer `pfs_months` than no sotorasib.

analyses.code: Welch-style large-sample mean comparison within kras_g12c-positive patients
analyses.result_summary: In kras_g12c-positive patients, mean PFS was 5.766 months with sotorasib (n=2246) vs 3.213 without (n=4122); difference 2.552 months, p=0.000.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with `kras_g12c` equal to 0, `treatment_sotorasib` is not associated with longer `pfs_months` than no sotorasib.

analyses.code: Welch-style large-sample mean comparison within kras_g12c-negative patients
analyses.result_summary: In kras_g12c-negative patients, mean PFS was 3.329 months with sotorasib (n=15298) vs 3.334 without (n=28334); difference -0.005 months, p=0.799.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association between `treatment_sotorasib` and `pfs_months` differs for patients with `egfr_mutation`; the `treatment_sotorasib` by `egfr_mutation` interaction is negative.

analyses.code: adjusted OLS with treatment_sotorasib * egfr_mutation plus treatment, biomarker, and clinical covariates
analyses.result_summary: The treatment_sotorasib by egfr_mutation interaction was -0.208 PFS months (SE 0.020, p=0.000).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association between `treatment_sotorasib` and `pfs_months` differs for patients with `alk_fusion`; the `treatment_sotorasib` by `alk_fusion` interaction is negative.

analyses.code: adjusted OLS with treatment_sotorasib * alk_fusion plus treatment, biomarker, and clinical covariates
analyses.result_summary: The treatment_sotorasib by alk_fusion interaction was -0.343 PFS months (SE 0.032, p=0.000).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association between `treatment_sotorasib` and `pfs_months` differs for patients with `brca2_mutation`; the `treatment_sotorasib` by `brca2_mutation` interaction is negative.

analyses.code: adjusted OLS with treatment_sotorasib * brca2_mutation plus treatment, biomarker, and clinical covariates
analyses.result_summary: The treatment_sotorasib by brca2_mutation interaction was -0.328 PFS months (SE 0.040, p=0.000).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association between `treatment_sotorasib` and `pfs_months` differs for patients with `tmb_high`; the `treatment_sotorasib` by `tmb_high` interaction is positive.

analyses.code: adjusted OLS with treatment_sotorasib * tmb_high plus treatment, biomarker, and clinical covariates
analyses.result_summary: The treatment_sotorasib by tmb_high interaction was 0.076 PFS months (SE 0.015, p=5.40e-7).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `stk11_mutation` equal to 1 have shorter `pfs_months` than patients without `stk11_mutation` after multivariable adjustment.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated the stk11_mutation-positive versus negative difference as -0.019 PFS months (SE 0.009, p=0.037).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `brca2_mutation` equal to 1 have shorter `pfs_months` than patients without `brca2_mutation` after multivariable adjustment.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated the brca2_mutation-positive versus negative difference as -0.109 PFS months (SE 0.019, p=8.16e-9).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving `treatment_pembrolizumab` have longer `pfs_months` than patients not receiving `treatment_pembrolizumab` after multivariable adjustment.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated the treatment_pembrolizumab versus no pembrolizumab difference as -0.006 PFS months (SE 0.007, p=0.383).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `pdl1_tps` is associated with longer `pfs_months`, with each 0.50 higher value of `pdl1_tps` increasing PFS after multivariable adjustment.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated the effect per 0.50 higher pdl1_tps as 0.003 PFS months (SE 0.008, p=0.668).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association between `treatment_pembrolizumab` and longer `pfs_months` is stronger when `pdl1_tps` is higher; the `treatment_pembrolizumab` by `pdl1_tps` interaction per 0.50 higher `pdl1_tps` is positive.

analyses.code: adjusted OLS with treatment_pembrolizumab * (pdl1_tps/0.5) plus treatment, biomarker, and clinical covariates
analyses.result_summary: The treatment_pembrolizumab by pdl1_tps interaction was 0.004 PFS months per 0.50 higher pdl1_tps (SE 0.015, p=0.781).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association between `treatment_osimertinib` and longer `pfs_months` is stronger in patients with `egfr_mutation`; the `treatment_osimertinib` by `egfr_mutation` interaction is positive.

analyses.code: adjusted OLS with treatment_osimertinib * egfr_mutation plus treatment, biomarker, and clinical covariates
analyses.result_summary: The treatment_osimertinib by egfr_mutation interaction was -0.020 PFS months (SE 0.021, p=0.335).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association between `treatment_olaparib` and longer `pfs_months` is stronger in patients with `brca2_mutation`; the `treatment_olaparib` by `brca2_mutation` interaction is positive.

analyses.code: adjusted OLS with treatment_olaparib * brca2_mutation plus treatment, biomarker, and clinical covariates
analyses.result_summary: The treatment_olaparib by brca2_mutation interaction was -0.004 PFS months (SE 0.042, p=0.930).
